content: Just as hybrid planning and learning systems in education combine in-person and remote student participation to fit diverse learner needs, we can design hybrid agent ecosystems that split goal-pursuit work between fully local on-device agents and cloud-hosted collaborative agents to match varied task constraints. This hybrid agent model leverages the low latency of local agents for urgent private tasks and the broad shared knowledge of cloud agents for open-ended collaborative problems, adapting just like a flexible HyFlex classroom.
